name: sous-monorepo
//overrides: react/react-dom/scheduler are pinned so the entire dependency tree — including transitive peer auto-installs — collapses to a single version. React Native 0.81.5 (Expo SDK 54) ships a renderer hard-coded to React 19.1.0, so any higher version crashes the mobile app. Bumping react here without also bumping @sous/mobile's expo/react-native will break the mobile app.
